Class CsvShelterRepository

java.lang.Object
shelter.repository.csv.CsvShelterRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
ShelterRepository
public class CsvShelterRepository extends Object implements ShelterRepository
CSV-backed implementation of ShelterRepository that persists shelter records to a flat file. Records are loaded into an in-memory LinkedHashMap at construction time and written back to disk on every save(Shelter) or delete(String) call to ensure durability.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CsvShelterRepository(String dataDir)
    Constructs a new CsvShelterRepository that reads from and writes to the given data directory.

  • Constructor Details

    • CsvShelterRepository

      public CsvShelterRepository(String dataDir)
      Constructs a new CsvShelterRepository that reads from and writes to the given data directory. If the CSV file does not yet exist it is created with just the header row; existing data is loaded into memory immediately.
      Parameters:
      dataDir - the path to the directory that contains (or will contain) the CSV file; must not be null or blank
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if dataDir is null or blank
      RuntimeException - if the data directory cannot be created or the file cannot be read

  • Method Details

    • save

      public void save(Shelter shelter)
      Persists a new shelter or overwrites the existing record with the same ID. Callers are responsible for ensuring the shelter is fully constructed before saving.
      Specified by:
      save in interface ShelterRepository
      Parameters:
      shelter - the shelter to save; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if shelter is null

    • findById

      public Optional<Shelter> findById(String id)
      Returns the shelter with the given ID, or an empty optional if not found. Does not throw if the ID is absent — callers decide how to handle the missing case.
      Specified by:
      findById in interface ShelterRepository
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier to look up; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the shelter, or empty if not found
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if id is null or blank

    • findAll

      public List<Shelter> findAll()
      Returns all shelters currently persisted in the store. Returns an empty list if no shelters have been saved.
      Specified by:
      findAll in interface ShelterRepository
      Returns:
      a list of all shelters

    • delete

      public void delete(String id)
      Removes the shelter record with the given ID from the store. Does nothing if no shelter with that ID exists.
      Specified by:
      delete in interface ShelterRepository
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the shelter to delete; must not be null or blank
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if id is null or blank
